timestamp_contract.frame_origin_role: time-slice origin carried by the frame header
timestamp_contract.frame_low_bits_rule: lower slice bits are zero in the frame header timestamp
timestamp_contract.debug1_role: dispatch timestamp sampled from the live global counter
timestamp_contract.debug1_relation: ingress debug1 is later than or equal to the frame origin and OPQ may delay it further
